title: Outcome Measurement, Baselines, Guardrails, and Evaluation Design · Claim Audit: Theory Of Change
summary: The capstone promises impact but relies on vanity metrics, no counterfactual, unclear instrumentation, and post hoc interpretation. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone theory of change increment in outcome evaluation and measurement protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.
Separate implemented controls and collected evidence from formal compliance, certification, approval, or legal conclusions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Theory Of Change · Theory Theory Of Change
steps.instruction:
theory case — Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Theory Of Change contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Theory Of Change · Theory Theory Of Change.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways. For Predict Theory Of Change · Theory Theory Of Change, keep Theory Of Change connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Theory Of Change condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing

options.text: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
A feature roadmap is equivalent to a theory of change. That claim does not survive the predict theory of change evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

content.text: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The worked example variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways. A defensible solution applies Theory Of Change, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to outcome evaluation and measurement protocol.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-5
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A feature roadmap is equivalent to a theory of change. This fails the Theory Of Change contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: GOV.UK Service Manual discovery and alpha guidance (Service Manual current 2026-07-15) — Controls problem-first discovery, affected-user and constraint research, measures of success, riskiest-assumption prototypes, and evidence-based stop decisions before production building.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.

stimulus.title: Theory Of Change failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A feature roadmap is equivalent to a theory of change.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Reconstruct the conditions for Theory Of Change, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.
Keep the artifact unchanged and rewrite the explanation so the current output appears intentional. That claim does not survive the repair the theory of change defect evidence boundary.

steps.title: Defend the Theory Of Change model · Theory Theory Of Change
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Theory Of Change: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.

Evidence target: Defend the Theory Of Change model · Theory Theory Of Change.

For Defend the Theory Of Change model · Theory Theory Of Change, keep Theory Of Change connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.
